title: Cryptosporidium GP60 Nested-PCR
author: Tosini Fabio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Video tutorial for  Cryptosporidium  spp. identification by nested-PCR on GP60 locus. Vision of  Cryptosporidium Nested-PCR 18S rDNA_V2.mp4  is convenient for applying this tutorial.
steps_raw: Video tutorial for  Cryptosporidium  spp. identification by nested-PCR on GP60 locus. Vision of  Cryptosporidium Nested-PCR 18S rDNA_V2.mp4  is convenient for applying this tutorial.
